fabio_nlm_question_template: Bar at {bar_time_et} ET. Price: {close}. IVB high: {ib_high}, IVB low: {ib_low}. IVB range: {ib_range} points. Volume Profile POC: {poc}, VA high: {va_high}, VA low: {va_low}. LVNs: {lvn_levels}. Big trades in last {lookback} bars: {wall_trade_count} trades totaling {wall_total_size} contracts at price ~{wall_level}, side: {wall_side}. Largest single trade: {wall_max_size} contracts. Bar volume: {bar_volume}, delta: {bar_delta}, close relative to IVB: {ib_position}. Day type so far: {day_type}. ENTRY TIMING RULE: Do NOT enter on the exact bar that just spiked with massive Big Trades. Wait for the *next* move (a pullback or confirmation of price acceptance). If the current bar is the initial spike, set confidence < 65 to wait. Is this a valid squeeze/second-drive setup to go {suggested_direction}? What is your confidence 0-100? Provide entry, stop, and target in NQ points.
fabio_imbalance_question_template: Bar at {bar_time_et} ET — IMBALANCE SESSION (price is trending OUTSIDE the IB). Price: {close}. IVB high: {ib_high}, IVB low: {ib_low}. IVB range: {ib_range} points. Volume Profile POC: {poc}, VA high: {va_high}, VA low: {va_low}. LVNs: {lvn_levels}. Big trades in last {lookback} bars: {wall_trade_count} trades totaling {wall_total_size} contracts at price ~{wall_level}, side: {wall_side}. Largest single trade: {wall_max_size} contracts. Bar volume: {bar_volume}, delta: {bar_delta}, close relative to IVB: {ib_position}. Day type: {day_type}. CONTEXT: Price is OUTSIDE the Initial Balance — this is an IMBALANCE day. DO NOT look for reversals inside the IB. You are looking for TREND CONTINUATION setups: either a reload/second-drive pullback to a structural level, OR strong Initiative Big Trades being rewarded by price acceptance outside the IB. ENTRY TIMING RULE: Do NOT enter on the exact bar that just spiked with massive Big Trades. Wait to see how the *next* move proceeds (pullback or acceptance). If the current bar is the initial volatile spike, set confidence < 65 to skip and wait. The bias direction is {suggested_direction} (following the IB breakout direction). TRAPPED TRADERS PATTERN: Look closely for Delta Divergence. If Delta is heavily against the trend (e.g., negative delta but price is advancing, or massive opposite Big Trades failing to push price), this indicates institutional ABSORPTION of trapped retail traders. This is the highest probability setup. If you spot this absorption pattern, set confidence >= 85%. Are there institutional Big Trades or absorption clusters that confirm the continuation of the trend in the {suggested_direction} direction? Set direction={suggested_direction} if the order flow confirms the trend, or 'none' only if delta is genuinely mixed with NO institutional participation. Confidence 0-100. Provide entry, stop (behind nearest structural wall or Big Trade origin), and target.

Fabio sees a {fabio_setup} setup going {fabio_direction} with confidence {fabio_confidence}. Big trade cluster at {wall_level} ({wall_side} side, {wall_trade_count} trades). Bar candle: open={open}, high={high}, low={low}, close={close}. Does this bar show an IBOB (Initial Balance Outside Bar) confirmation pattern? Is the close outside the IB? Are big trades in the candle body (not wick)? Does it confirm Fabio's {fabio_direction} bias? Confidence 0-100?
andrea_imbalance_question_template: Bar at {bar_time_et} ET on NQ — IMBALANCE SESSION. Price: {close}. IB high: {ib_high}, IB low: {ib_low}. Fabio sees an {fabio_setup} setup going {fabio_direction} with confidence {fabio_confidence}. Big trade cluster at {wall_level} ({wall_side} side, {wall_trade_count} trades). Bar candle: open={open}, high={high}, low={low}, close={close}. CONTEXT: The market is in a sustained momentum phase outside the Initial Balance. DO NOT enforce rigid IBOB range/breakout rules here. Instead, evaluate TREND CONTINUATION. Does the M1 footprint and volume acceptance confirm the {fabio_direction} momentum? Is Fabio's structural stop securely behind a new institutional wall or swing extreme? If the flow supports the trend, confirm the trade. Confidence 0-100?
